name: Synchrona command center and host controls
description: Focused regression coverage for the newest Synchrona room features: the Command Center overview, live verification board, permission matrix, Host User Controller granular toggles, private/public to-dos, generic comments, expanded poll options, chat moderation, and duplicate-room join protection. Run the Supabase feature_permissions_todos_comments_patch.sql patch before this test.

planSteps.expected: The Synchrona sign-in form loads without a 500 error or unhandled application error.

planSteps.description: Sign in with the configured authenticated TestSprite account.
planSteps.expected: Authentication succeeds and the dashboard is visible.

planSteps.description: Create a room titled 'TestSprite Command Center Event' with a budget cap of 1500, or open the newest available room if room creation already completed.
planSteps.expected: A room workspace opens with the current user marked as HOST.

planSteps.description: Verify the Command tab is visible and selected by default.
planSteps.expected: The room renders the Command Center without requiring a manual page refresh.

planSteps.description: Verify the readiness score, open polls metric, task progress metric, budget health metric, live verification board, and permission matrix are visible.
planSteps.expected: Each Command Center region renders with stable, human-readable text.

planSteps.description: Verify the participant sidebar shows the Host User Controller with toggles for edit room settings, edit budget, edit itinerary, create polls, resolve polls, manage to-do lists, create public to-dos, manage users, use chat, moderate chat, and moderate comments.
planSteps.expected: The host can inspect and toggle granular room permissions rather than only choosing Editor or Viewer.

planSteps.description: Open the Timeline tab, add one day plus one proposed activity if the room is empty, create a poll, use Add option to add more than five options, and submit the poll.
planSteps.expected: The itinerary update succeeds, the poll accepts more than five options, and poll creation does not hit a row-level-security error.

planSteps.description: Write a timeline comment and an activity comment, then delete the comment as the same user.
planSteps.expected: Comments can be created and the author's own comment can be deleted.

planSteps.description: Open the Tasks tab, create a private to-do, create a public to-do if the host permission is enabled, toggle a checkbox, and add a to-do comment.
planSteps.expected: Private and public room to-dos render with checkboxes, scope labels, and comment controls.

planSteps.description: Open the Budget tab and verify the budget usage bar shows the correct percentage and a budget comments section.
planSteps.expected: The budget bar fill matches the displayed usage percentage and budget comments are available.

planSteps.description: Open the Chat tab, send a message, delete the user's own message, and verify clear-chat is visible only when chat moderation is enabled.
planSteps.expected: Chat supports own-message deletion and permission-based moderation.

planSteps.description: Try joining the same room again using the invite link or room code.
planSteps.expected: The app routes back to the room without overwriting the user's existing role or creating a duplicate participant.
The live verification board reflects itinerary activity and still shows no fatal error.

planSteps.description: Verify no missing Supabase configuration warning, generic application error, 404 page, or 500 page is visible.
planSteps.expected: The focused host-controls flow completes cleanly.
